query:
SELECT
                debname AS "debname!: String",
                COUNT(*) AS "delivery_count!: i64",
                SUM(size) AS "total_delivered!: i64",
                MAX(size) AS "package_size!: i64"
            FROM deliveries
            WHERE debname LIKE '%.deb'
               OR debname LIKE '%.udeb'
               OR debname LIKE '%.ddeb'
            GROUP BY debname
            ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
            LIMIT ?;
